text: Welcome to the deal room for Downtown Office Tower. Please review the Letter of Intent (LOI) by EOD today — it's available in the Documents tab.
Thanks John. LOI reviewed and approved on our side. Awaiting seller's signature.
🔐 KYC verification for Buyer 'Investor Name' has been successfully approved. Documents have been hashed and recorded on-chain. Advancing checklist to next item.
Confirming receipt of signed LOI. Proceeding with due diligence checklist preparation. We'll need access to the data room by Friday.
⚠️ AML review for Seller 'Global Properties Inc.' is pending. Additional UBO documentation requested. Please upload via the Documents tab.
We've uploaded the requested UBO declarations and shareholder registry. Please confirm receipt.
Great. Once AML clears, can we schedule the property walkthrough next week?
